source_repos: ~/Projects/cowork/portfolio-research/.claude/skills/news-intelligence/data/companies.json (2026-03-25, v3.0) — schema base, queries, social IDs

actor_field_mapping.queries.linkedin: harvestapi/linkedin-post-search (keyword search across all LI posts)

data_quality_notes: IČO: verified via or.justice.cz / ARES (CZ_ICO key in identifiers.registry_ids).
Glassdoor IDs: verified for companies with employer profiles.
SEC CIK: only Autolus (0001730463) actively files with SEC.
Seeking Alpha: verified tickers for publicly traded companies.
Trustpilot: verified URLs for consumer-facing brands.
App IDs: verified for companies with consumer apps. B2B companies have none.
IR URLs: verified for public companies + group-level entry.
Empty arrays = intentional: company has no presence on that platform (verified, not missing data).
LinkedIn queries: all companies have queries for harvestapi/linkedin-post-search.
Instagram hashtags: B2C + consumer-facing brands. B2B/biotech = empty (verified no IG presence).
Instagram profiles: best-effort handles. Verify via apify/instagram-profile-scraper before bulk scraping.
upstream_issues: local/CZ/companies.json (2026-03-19): MONETA Money Bank a.s. (IČO 25672720) is classified under competitors.banking, but is in fact a portfolio company (~29% PPF stake via Tanemo a.s.). Upstream source needs correction.

local/ESG/companies.json (2026-03-19): air_bank and ppf_banka LEI placeholders ('TODO_lookup_LEI') resolved via GLEIF: Air Bank a.s. = 31570010000000049662, PPF banka a.s. = 31570010000000036567. Upstream source can be enriched.

local/UK/companies.json (2026-03-19): ClearBank entry was placeholder-only (search_url, no CRN). Resolved via UK Companies House: ClearBank Limited CRN 09736376; parent ClearBank Group Holdings Limited CRN 14254435. Upstream source can be enriched.
Original news-intel data_quality_notes claimed '16 Czech IČO verified' — actual count is 14 portfolio + 1 group = 15. Adjusted in this version.

Sazka/Allwyn removed from portfolio (was in news-intel v3.0 with ppf_stake='via KKCG partnership'). User-confirmed: not a PPF portfolio company. KKCG (Karel Komárek) is the owner; PPF has no documented stake.

portfolio.name: InPost
portfolio.notes: FedEx/Advent takeover bid EUR15.60/share active. Euronext Amsterdam only, no SEC filings, no SA coverage.

portfolio.name: MONETA Money Bank
portfolio.notes: Listed Prague Stock Exchange, PPF ~29% via Tanemo a.s. Major Czech retail bank. SA coverage via OTC ticker GMYYF.

portfolio.name: ProSiebenSat.1 Media
portfolio.notes: German media group. PPF exited — sold entire ~15% stake to MFE-MediaForEurope in Aug 2025. SA coverage via OTC PBSFF/PBSFY.

portfolio.name: Viaplay Group
portfolio.notes: Nordic streaming, PPF significant stake ~30%. SA coverage via legacy ticker NENTF.

portfolio.name: Autolus Therapeutics
portfolio.notes: CAR-T cell therapy biotech, NASDAQ listed. SEC CIK verified. Full SA coverage.

portfolio.name: Solidcore Resources
portfolio.notes: Gold/silver mining, Kazakhstan. Listed AIX (Astana). Formerly Polymetal International. SA via POYYF.

portfolio.name: Air Bank
portfolio.notes: Czech neobank, 100% PPF, private. IČO verified.

portfolio.name: Home Credit
portfolio.notes: Consumer finance, operations in Asia + CEE. Parent = Home Credit N.V. (NL, KVK 34126597). IČO 60192666 = Home Credit International a.s. (CZ entity). Glassdoor verified. Trustpilot only PH/IN markets. Multiple regional apps.

portfolio.name: PPF banka
portfolio.notes: Czech corporate bank, private. Low public profile, minimal social media presence. IČO verified.

portfolio.name: ClearBank
portfolio.notes: UK clearing bank, fintech infrastructure. B2B model = no consumer apps/reviews. UK CRN not yet captured (lookup via Companies House). UK_CRN 09736376 = ClearBank Limited (operating). UK_CRN_PARENT 14254435 = ClearBank Group Holdings Limited.

portfolio.name: Yettel Bank
portfolio.notes: Digital bank within e& PPF Telecom Group. Very new entity, minimal public footprint.

portfolio.name: CME (Central European Media Enterprises)
portfolio.notes: 100% PPF. TV Nova (CZ/SK), Pro TV (RO), channels in BG, HR, SI. Parent = CME Media Enterprises B.V. (NL, KVK 33246826). IČO 45800456 = TV Nova s.r.o. (formerly CET 21). Subsidiary registry IDs: RO_CUI 2835636 = PRO TV S.R.L. (Romania); HR_MBS 080222668 / HR_OIB 75399377119 = Nova TV d.d. (Croatia).

portfolio.name: e& PPF Telecom Group
portfolio.notes: JV with e& (Etisalat). Umbrella for O2, Yettel operators + CETIN infra. Parent = e& PPF Telecom Group B.V. (NL). No dedicated Glassdoor (JV est. Oct 2024).

portfolio.name: O2 Czech Republic
portfolio.notes: Part of e& PPF Telecom Group. IČO verified. ISIN CZ0009093209.

portfolio.name: O2 Slovakia
portfolio.notes: Slovak mobile operator within e& PPF Telecom

portfolio.name: Yettel (Serbia)
portfolio.notes: Serbian mobile operator, formerly Telenor Serbia

portfolio.name: Yettel (Hungary)
portfolio.notes: Hungarian mobile operator, formerly Telenor Hungary

portfolio.name: Yettel (Bulgaria)
portfolio.notes: Bulgarian mobile operator, formerly Telenor Bulgaria

portfolio.name: CETIN Group
portfolio.notes: Telecom infrastructure backbone. CETIN CZ (spun from O2 in 2015) + CETIN International (SK, HU, BG, RS). IČO = CETIN a.s. SK_ICO 48074560 = CETIN Slovakia s.r.o. Glassdoor verified.

portfolio.name: SOTIO Biotech
portfolio.notes: Oncology biotech, PPF 100%. DCVAC platform. Subsidiaries: Cytune Pharma (FR), Cellestia Biotech (CH). IČO = SOTIO Biotech a.s.

portfolio.name: Cytune Pharma
portfolio.notes: French biotech, immuno-oncology. Acquired 2018. Lead program SO-C101 (RLI-15). Subsidiary of SOTIO. Very small entity, minimal public data.

portfolio.name: Cellestia Biotech
portfolio.notes: Swiss biotech, Notch signaling pathway inhibitors for oncology. Very small entity.

portfolio.name: Heureka Group
portfolio.notes: 50% PPF, 50% EC Investments. E-commerce comparison platform in 9 CEE countries. ~50M visits/month, 55k+ e-shops. Owns Balíkobot. IČO verified.

portfolio.name: Škoda Group
portfolio.notes: Public transport manufacturer (trains, trams, trolleybuses). IČO = SKODA TRANSPORTATION a.s. Glassdoor verified.

portfolio.name: TEMSA
portfolio.notes: Turkish bus/coach manufacturer. 50/50 JV with Sabancı. Revenue EUR440M (2023). Municipal, intercity, tourist buses + electric units.

portfolio.name: ITIS Holding
portfolio.notes: 100% PPF. Owns CzechToll (CZ_ICO 06315160), SkyToll (SK_ICO 44500734), TollNet, PaySystem. Acquired VITRONIC (DE) in 2024. IČO verified.

portfolio.name: VITRONIC
portfolio.notes: German traffic tech & automation. Wiesbaden HQ. Acquired by ITIS Holding (PPF) in early 2024. DE HRB number not yet captured (lookup via Handelsregister).

portfolio.name: Bestsport
portfolio.notes: O2 Arena Prague, O2 Universum, adjacent hotel. Major entertainment venue. IČO verified.

portfolio.name: PPF Real Estate
portfolio.notes: Hilton Prague, Gasworx Tampa FL, other properties. CZ_ICO 27638987 = PPF Real Estate s.r.o. NL_KVK 34276162 = PPF Real Estate Holding B.V.

portfolio.name: EmbedIT
portfolio.notes: IT services company within PPF Group. Registered as EmbedIT s.r.o. IČO verified.

group.name: PPF Group
group.notes: Group-level monitoring — M&A, leadership, strategy. Co-CEOs: Jiří Šmejc, Didier Stoessel. CZ_ICO 25099345 = PPF a.s. (Czech entity). NL_KVK 33264887 = PPF Group N.V. (NL parent). LEI 31570048XH84U51GGT05 = PPF a.s. Additional LEIs: PPF Group N.V. = 31570030000000000550, PPF GATE a.s. = 315700PCZMP6G5WNBI76, PPF NIPOS B.V. = 724500FD5UD4PPT8SL07, PPF Comco N.V. = 315700NGN3TS94DD0L17.
